summary: Frontend-only verification of (A) Print Requests page status tiles + multi-select + city filter and (B) Design Request detail header redesign. All features work as specified.

print_requests_page.status_tiles_render: PASS - 6 tiles rendered with data-testid print-status-tile-<statusId> and correct counts (Submitted 0, New 2, In Printing 1, Printed 0, On Hold 2, Cancelled 0; total 5 matches expected)
print_requests_page.single_tile_filter: PASS - Clicking 'New' tile filters list to 2 rows
print_requests_page.multi_select_union: PASS - Clicking 'New' (2) then 'In Printing' (1) shows 3 rows (union). Tiles show visual selection ring in screenshot.
print_requests_page.deselect_tile: PASS - Clicking 'New' again with 'In Printing' still selected reduces list to 1 row
print_requests_page.clear_button: PASS - print-clear-filters resets list to all 5 rows and clears selected tiles and city
print_requests_page.city_filter_dropdown: PASS - print-city-filter dropdown shows ['All cities', 'Mumbai']; selecting Mumbai filters to 2 rows
print_requests_page.lead_city_displayed: PASS - 'Mumbai' shown under lead name in rows (rendered 5x in HTML after filter incl. dropdown label)
print_requests_page.combined_filters: PASS - In Printing status + Mumbai city returns 0 rows (empty state 'No print requests yet' shown correctly)

design_request_header.due_date_chip: PASS - mr-due-chip present, shows 'Due Date 03 Oct 2026'
design_request_header.est_finish_chip: PASS - mr-est-date-display present, shows 'Est. Finish Set date'
design_request_header.est_date_popover: PASS - Clicking chip opens mr-est-date-popover date picker (July 2026 calendar visible)
design_request_header.title_present_lighter: PASS - 'Neck Tags' title rendered with lighter styling (not oversized bold); spacing tightened per screenshot
design_request_header.regression_page_loads: PASS - Work Versions, Comments, Status History, badges, Current State, Available Actions, Details all present. No new console errors from header change (only 2 pre-existing 401s on unrelated resources).

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The visual selection state of status tiles is applied via inline style/wrapper (screenshots confirm), but the base className string returned by getAttribute did not visibly change - if this is done via style attribute it works, otherwise adding an aria-pressed or class-based indicator would be more test-friendly. Not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Print Requests: statusIds passed as comma list to backend; facets endpoint returns status_counts, total, cities. Design Request MR-2026-0006 (id 537081ec-e022-4d26-a39c-25045cf2e6ee) confirms header redesign. Screenshots stored under /app/.screenshots/print_union.png, /app/.screenshots/design_header.png, /app/.screenshots/design_est_popover.png.
